ambiguities.aspect: Allocation of purchase price between land and building
ambiguities.input_contextualized_conventional_defaul: 'Building acquired for demolition' = entire cost allocated to land per IFRS convention.
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: When a building is acquired for demolition, the entire purchase price is allocated to land (IAS 16).

ambiguities.aspect: Present value calculation for deferred payment
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: IFRS requires deferred payment arrangements beyond normal credit terms to be recorded at present value, with the difference recognized as interest expense over the payment period.

flags.aspect: Present value calculation of annuity payments

best_attempt.reason: Land recorded at PV of 6 annual payments of $10M at 6% interest rate; difference between $60M nominal and PV is discount on note payable to be amortized as interest expense.

complexity_flags.aspect: Present value calculation of annuity payments

best_attempt.reason: Land recorded at PV of 6 annual payments of $10M at 6% interest rate; difference between $60M nominal and PV is discount on note payable to be amortized as interest expense.

output_decision_maker.proceed_reason: IFRS rules resolve building-for-demolition as land, and all PV computation inputs (rate, periods, amounts) are stated for downstream calculation.
output_decision_maker.overall_final_rationale: All inputs for PV calculation are stated (6 payments of $10M, 6% rate, ordinary annuity), building acquired for demolition resolves to land, and downstream calculator can compute the exact PV.
